name: chain_geoduels__i_built_a_100_free_geoguessr
method: GeoDuels - I built a 100% free GeoGuessr clone in my mom's basement

stages.task: scrape r/SideProject + HN for existing geo-game posts, extract engagement metrics and which niches get most upvotes
generate 10 niche variant HTML bundles from base template using niche_configs.json
surge deploy each variant, capture live URLs, smoke test with Playwright
generate longtail SEO landing pages + submit to GSC + add internal linking between variants
post dev story to r/SideProject + route 3 tweets + 1 IH post through content pipeline
